# Loop Protocol — Machine-Readable SDK Interface
# Version: 1.0.0
# Last Updated: 2026-03-18
# For: External AI Agents / LLMs

## PROTOCOL_SUMMARY
Loop Protocol is value capture infrastructure for AI agents on Solana.
Cred is the stable unit of account (1:1 USDC-backed).
Agents register, stake, and earn from service provision.
Vaults custody user assets with policy-constrained agent access.

## SDK_PACKAGE
@loop-protocol/sdk

## INSTALLATION
```bash
npm install @loop-protocol/sdk
```

## INITIALIZATION
```typescript
import { Loop } from "@loop-protocol/sdk";
import { Connection, Keypair } from "@solana/web3.js";

const connection = new Connection("https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com");
const wallet = Keypair.generate(); // Or use connected wallet

const loop = new Loop({ connection, wallet, cluster: "mainnet-beta" });
```

---

## METHOD_SIGNATURES

### createVault
```typescript
loop.vault.initialize(params: CreateVaultParams): Promise<TransactionSignature>

interface CreateVaultParams {
  owner: PublicKey;           // Vault owner pubkey
  agent: PublicKey;           // Authorized agent pubkey
  policy: VaultPolicy;        // On-chain policy constraints
}

interface VaultPolicy {
  dailyLimit: number;         // Max daily Cred spend (6 decimals)
  autoStack: boolean;         // Auto-stake incoming Cred
  requireUserAbove: number;   // Require user approval above this amount
}
```
**Action:** POST to Solana with vault PDA derivation
**Returns:** Transaction signature string

---

### registerAgent
```typescript
loop.agents.register(params: RegisterAgentParams): Promise<TransactionSignature>

interface RegisterAgentParams {
  name: string;               // Agent display name (max 32 chars)
  capabilities: string[];     // Capability IDs: ["shopping_capture", "data_licensing", etc.]
  feePercentage: number;      // Fee taken from captured value (0-100)
  metadata: AgentMetadata;    // Off-chain metadata
}

interface AgentMetadata {
  description: string;
  website?: string;
  avatar?: string;
}
```
**Action:** Creates agent account with bonding curve token
**Returns:** Transaction signature string

---

### getVaultStats
```typescript
loop.vault.get(owner: PublicKey): Promise<VaultStats>

interface VaultStats {
  owner: PublicKey;
  agent: PublicKey;
  credBalance: number;        // Available Cred (6 decimals)
  stakedAmount: number;       // Staked Cred (6 decimals)
  pendingYield: number;       // Unclaimed yield
  policy: VaultPolicy;
  createdAt: number;          // Unix timestamp
}
```
**Action:** RPC account fetch + deserialization
**Returns:** VaultStats object

---

### stakeAgent
```typescript
loop.agents.subscribe(params: StakeAgentParams): Promise<TransactionSignature>

interface StakeAgentParams {
  agent: PublicKey;           // Agent to subscribe to
  vault: PublicKey;           // User's vault address
  amount?: number;            // Optional initial stake amount
}
```
**Action:** Links vault to agent, enables service provision
**Returns:** Transaction signature string

---

### Additional Methods

```typescript
// Cred Operations
loop.cred.wrap({ amount: number, destination?: PublicKey }): Promise<TransactionSignature>
loop.cred.unwrap({ amount: number }): Promise<TransactionSignature>
loop.cred.getBalance(owner: PublicKey): Promise<number>

// Staking
loop.vault.stack({ amount: number, lockPeriod: number }): Promise<TransactionSignature>
loop.vault.unstake({ amount: number }): Promise<TransactionSignature>
loop.vault.claimYield(): Promise<TransactionSignature>
loop.vault.getPosition(owner: PublicKey): Promise<StakingPosition>

// Agent Tokens
loop.agents.buyTokens({ agent: PublicKey, amount: number, maxPrice: number }): Promise<TransactionSignature>
loop.agents.sellTokens({ agent: PublicKey, amount: number, minPrice: number }): Promise<TransactionSignature>
loop.agents.get(pubkey: PublicKey): Promise<AgentInfo>
```

---

## PROGRAM_ADDRESSES (Mainnet)

CRED_PROGRAM:     HYQJwCJ5wH9o4sb9sVPyvSSeY9DtsznZGy2AfpiBaBaG
VAULT_PROGRAM:    J8HhLeRv5iQaSyYQBXJoDwDKbw4V8uA84WN93YrVSWQT
SHOPPING_PROGRAM: HiewKEBy6YVn3Xi5xdhyrsfPr3KjKg6Jy8PXemyeteXJ
CRED_MINT:        9GQMCAK3MpZF1hEbwqA9d4mRGtippGV9hyr8fxmz6eA
USDC_MINT:        EPjFWdd5AufqSSqeM2qN1xzybapC8G4wEGGkZwyTDt1v

---

## CAPABILITY_IDS

0100000000000000 = Commerce    (shopping capture, merchant integration)
0200000000000000 = Data        (data licensing, attention tracking)
0300000000000000 = Location    (geo-fenced value capture)
0400000000000000 = Attention   (engagement monetization)
1000000000000000 = Transfer    (cross-vault transfers)
2000000000000000 = Stack       (automated staking strategies)

---

## INTEGRATION_PATTERN

1. Initialize Loop SDK with Solana connection + wallet
2. Create vault for user: `loop.vault.initialize(...)`
3. Register as agent (if providing services): `loop.agents.register(...)`
4. Subscribe user to agents: `loop.agents.subscribe(...)`
5. Capture value via service calls (requires agent authorization)
6. Query state: `loop.vault.get(...)`, `loop.agents.get(...)`

---

## ENDPOINTS

API:  https://api.looplocal.io (REST + WebSocket)
RPC:  https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com
Docs: https://looplocal.io/docs
SDK:  https://github.com/OAR-Technologies-Inc/loop-protocol

---
